testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: FAILED: Expected to land on home.html after logout, but current URL is: https://www.saucedemo.com/ expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: FAILED: Expected to land on home.html after logout, but current URL is: https://www.saucedemo.com/ expected [true] but found [false] at com.saucedemo.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.theLogoutShouldNavigateToTheHomePage(LoginSteps.java:138) at ✽.the logout should navigate to the home page(file:///C:/Users/omkar.qualitrix/Saucedemo_SeleniumAutomation_AI/src/test/resources/features/EndToEnd.feature:30) ...
